plugins.name: oh-my-claudecode
plugins.detail: Multi-agent orchestration with specialized agents, ralph/ultrawork loops, team coordination.

plugins.name: PAI Pipeline
plugins.detail: 5-stage AI development pipeline: design → harness → validate → ship.

plugins.name: PR Review Toolkit
plugins.detail: Specialized agents for code review, comment analysis, test coverage, silent failures.

plugins.name: feature-dev
plugins.detail: Guided feature development: explore → architect → execute with codebase understanding.

plugins.name: plugin-dev
plugins.detail: Scaffold and validate Claude Code plugins (commands, skills, agents, hooks, MCP).

plugins.name: frontend-design
plugins.detail: Generate distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces that avoid generic AI aesthetics.

plugins.name: Ralph Wiggum loop
plugins.detail: Self-referential loop runner until task completion with configurable reviewer.

plugins.name: Agent SDK Dev
plugins.detail: Scaffold Python / TypeScript Claude Agent SDK applications with verifier subagents.

mcpServers.name: Atlassian (Jira / Confluence)
mcpServers.detail: Read and write Jira issues, Confluence pages with OAuth.
mcpServers.install: claude mcp add atlassian --transport sse https://mcp.atlassian.com/sse

mcpServers.name: Notion
mcpServers.detail: Search and edit Notion pages and databases.
mcpServers.install: claude mcp add notion --transport sse https://mcp.notion.com/sse

mcpServers.name: Sentry
mcpServers.detail: Query Sentry issues, releases, events; assist with root-cause analysis.
mcpServers.install: claude mcp add sentry --transport sse https://mcp.sentry.dev/sse

mcpServers.name: Google Drive
mcpServers.detail: Search and read Google Drive files; create new docs.
mcpServers.install: claude mcp add google-drive --transport sse https://mcp.googleapis.com/drive/sse

mcpServers.name: Microsoft 365
mcpServers.install: claude mcp add microsoft-365 --transport sse https://mcp.office.com/sse

mcpServers.name: Cloudflare Developer Platform
mcpServers.detail: Manage Workers, R2, D1, KV via Cloudflare's MCP server.
mcpServers.install: claude mcp add cloudflare --transport sse https://mcp.cloudflare.com/sse
